summary: Iteration 24 - All UI/UX refinements verified successfully. About page with gold accents, domain tags grid, 4 principle cards with ghost numbers, vision block, footer with SIJILL PROJECT logo. CourseDetail 5 tabs working (Épisodes, Frise, Contexte, Bibliographie, Conférences). Frise tab correctly shows only 2 cursus-specific timelines. ResourceViewer for context shows module info, thinker name, diamond divider, colored section bars. ResourceViewer for bibliography shows title with accent bar, diamond divider, formatted content. Body font-size is 18px. All pages load correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: React website UI/UX refinements fully tested. All new layouts matching mobile app design confirmed.

body_font_size.details: Body font-size is 18px as specified in index.css

about_page_v3.details: About page with gold accents, eyebrow ('Notre identité'), diamond separators (4 found), 4 principle cards with ghost numbers, 15 domain tags, vision block ('Notre ambition'), footer with SIJILL PROJECT logo

cursus_page.details: Cursus page loads correctly with all 5 cursus (A-E)

login_page.details: Login page loads with email/password form. Login works with test credentials.

course_detail_5_tabs.details: All 5 tabs visible: Épisodes, Frise, Contexte, Bibliographie, Conférences

frise_tab_cursus_specific.details: Frise tab shows exactly 2 timelines for cursus-falsafa (cursus-specific, not all 5+). Timelines: 'Carte des Penseurs IXe – XVIIe siècle' and 'De La Mecque à Bagdad 570 — 830'
